mapper.sql:
SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.basic_desc AS basicDesc, p.brand AS brand, p.price AS price, p.discount_rate AS discountRate, p.point AS point, p.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.sold_count AS soldCount,
MAX(CASE WHEN pi.image_type = 'THUMB1' THEN pi.image_path END) AS imagePath,
ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(pr.rating), 0), 1) AS avgRating, COUNT(DISTINCT pr.review_no) AS reviewCount
FROM product p
LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.product_no = pi.product_no
LEFT JOIN product_review pr ON p.product_no = pr.product_no
WHERE p.status = '판매중'
GROUP BY p.product_no, p.product_name, p.basic_desc, p.brand, p.price, p.discount_rate, p.point, p.delivery_fee, p.view_count, p.sold_count
mapper.select: ORDER BY avgRating DESC, reviewCount DESC LIMIT 8
ORDER BY p.discount_rate DESC, p.price DESC LIMIT 8
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE cate_no = #{cateNo} AND status = '판매중'
